query: SELECT id, openId, name, email, role, loginMethod, CASE WHEN passwordHash IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN passwordHash = '' THEN 'EMPTY' ELSE CONCAT('SET(', LEFT(passwordHash, 10), '...)') END as passwordStatus FROM users WHERE email = 'takashimoriwaki@kokoronohinata.com';
